title: Shielded balance query
description: Sum all unspent confirmed notes in wallet DB to produce available balance. Expose as an async fn balance() -> Zatoshi. Distinguish confirmed (depth >= 10) from pending (depth < 10). Used by /balance CLI command.
close_reason: Implemented: Balance struct (confirmed_zatoshi/pending_zatoshi/total_zatoshi), WalletStore::balance(scan_tip, min_confirmations) with single bulk SQL SUM. Added block_height to Note struct + migration v4 (ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN). 4 balance tests with hand-derived oracles.
